_provenance: Fully SYNTHETIC and GENERIC financial-compliance rule taxonomy authored for this evaluation. It is NOT any real institution's compliance policy, KYC/AML program, sanctions screening configuration, or risk model, and reproduces no real policy text. Rules key on abstract MARKER tokens (e.g. MARKER_SANCTIONS_HIT), never on real customer, account, or transaction data; case records in the fixtures are benign fabricated sentences carrying those marker tokens. No real customers, accounts, transactions, PII, sanctions lists, SAR/CTR filings, or screening internals are represented. Prescribed dispositions, severities, and the access-control matrix are illustrative constructs for exercising eval metrics, not operational rules for any real system.
_schema: Each rule has id, name, markers (abstract tokens that key the rule), disposition (approve | reject | escalate), and severity (low | medium | high). Disposition 'escalate' routes high-severity, leakage-sensitive records to a human compliance officer rather than auto-rejecting.
